boundary_binding.action_boundary: Invoice release requires exact source closure
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: No source record closes the exact boundary
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: Three-way match plus approver limit remain open

final_answer: Source records do not close the exact invoice-release boundary. The control record leaves the three-way match plus approver limit unresolved, and policy says communication tone cannot override source-control records. The action may not proceed. Escalate until the missing authority and match status are resolved.
